identity.name: Claude Code Singapore
identity.description: Singapore's developer community for AI-assisted coding, Claude Code workshops, and building with LLM tools. Meetups, hackathons, and open source collaboration.

capabilities.name: Find Upcoming Events
capabilities.description: Get a list of upcoming meetups, workshops, and hackathons organized by Claude Code Singapore.

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: Filter by event type: meetup, workshop, hackathon, all (default: all)

inputs.name: after
inputs.description: ISO 8601 date to filter events after (default: today)

inputs.name: limit
inputs.description: Max number of events to return (default: 10)

outputs.name: events
outputs.description: Array of event objects with title, date, location, url, description, capacity, and registered count

events.title: Build with Claude Code: From Prompt to Production

capabilities.name: Find Community Members
capabilities.description: Search for community members by skills, interests, or availability for collaboration.

inputs.name: available_for
inputs.description: Filter by availability: mentoring, collaboration, hiring, speaking

outputs.name: members
outputs.description: Array of member profiles with name, bio, skills, links, and availability

capabilities.name: Submit Talk Proposal
capabilities.description: Submit a talk or workshop proposal for an upcoming community event.

inputs.name: duration
inputs.description: Preferred duration: lightning (5min), short (15min), full (30min), workshop (60-120min)

outputs.name: proposal_id
outputs.description: Unique ID for tracking the proposal

capabilities.name: Get Learning Resources
capabilities.description: Browse curated learning resources, tutorials, and project templates shared by the community.

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: Resource type: tutorial, template, video, article, tool (default: all)

outputs.name: resources
outputs.description: Array of resources with title, url, description, author, type, and rating

protocols.description: Community API for events, members, and resources
MCP server for AI agent access to community data and event management
LLM context file with community guidelines, event history, and resource index
Community website with events calendar, member directory, and resource library

free_tier.limits: All community features are free. Some workshops may have a nominal fee to cover venue costs.

plans.name: Community Sponsor
plans.description: For companies that want to support the community and get visibility at events

faq.question: How do I join the community?
faq.answer: Join our Discord at discord.gg/claudecodesg — it's free and open to all developers interested in AI-assisted coding.

faq.question: Where are events held?
faq.answer: Events are held at various tech company offices across Singapore (Google, Shopee, GovTech) and occasionally online. Check lu.ma/claudecodesg for upcoming events.

faq.question: Can I speak at an event?
faq.answer: Yes! Submit a talk proposal through our API or website. We welcome talks on Claude Code, MCP, AI SDK, prompting techniques, and any AI-assisted development topics.

faq.question: Is this an official Anthropic community?
faq.answer: No. Claude Code Singapore is an independent developer community. We are not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic.

use_cases.title: Find relevant developer events in Singapore
use_cases.description: An AI agent helping a developer relocating to Singapore can discover and register for relevant community events.

use_cases.title: Connect with AI developers
use_cases.description: Agents can search the member directory to find developers with specific skills for collaboration or hiring.

use_cases.title: Curate learning paths
use_cases.description: An AI tutor can pull community-curated resources to build personalized learning paths for AI-assisted development.

sla.support_hours: Community-driven via Discord, typically responsive within 24 hours

related.description: SaaS CV builder — several community members contribute to the Freddy's API
Creator of Claude and Claude Code — the tools our community builds with
Singapore's broader developer community — we co-organize events occasionally

alternatives.name: GDG Singapore
alternatives.differentiator: Claude Code SG focuses specifically on AI-assisted development and LLM tooling
